scripts.release: pnpm run test && pnpm version patch && node ./scripts/sync && pnpm run build && git add . && git commit -m "chore: bump version" && git push && pnpm run pub
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run test && pnpm version minor && node ./scripts/sync && pnpm run build && git add . && git commit -m "chore: bump version" && git push && pnpm run pub
